name: add_reaction_to_an_item
description: Adds a specified emoji reaction to an existing message in a slack channel, identified by its timestamp; does not remove or retrieve reactions.

name.description:
Name of the emoji to add as a reaction (e.g., 'thumbsup'). This is the emoji name without colons. For emojis with skin tone modifiers, append '::skin-tone-X' where X is a number from 2 to 6 (e.g., 'wave::skin-tone-3').
Examples:
  "thumbsup"
  "grinning"
  "robot_face"
  "wave::skin-tone-3"

channel.description:
ID of the channel where the message to add the reaction to was posted.
Examples:
  "C1234567890"
  "G0987654321"

timestamp.description:
Timestamp of the message to which the reaction will be added. This is a unique identifier for the message, typically a string representing a float value like '1234567890.123456'.
Examples:
  "1234567890.123456"
  "1609459200.000200"
